ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social media platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data collection */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Last time the platform was synced with the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform where the post was collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "post_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "post_stance" TEXT /* Stance of the post (e.g., remain, leave, other) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "post_image" TEXT /* URL of the image attached to the post */,
  "post_video" TEXT /* URL of the video attached to the post */,
  "post_location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made */,
  "post_language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "post_engagement" INTEGER /* Number of likes, comments, and shares */,
  "post_source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "post_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the post was made */,
  "post_device" TEXT /* Device used to make the post */,
  "post_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the post location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag (e.g., #Brexit, #PCPEU) */,
  "hashtag_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword (e.g., Brexit, politics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_keywords" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentioned_users" (
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentioned user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the mentioned user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the mentioned user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the mentioned user */,
  "user_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the mentioned user */,
  "user_following" INTEGER /* Number of users the mentioned user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mentioned_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_mentioned_users" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "mentioned_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stances" (
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stance */,
  "stance_name" TEXT /* Name of the stance (e.g., remain, leave, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_sentiments" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_stances" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "stance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment detected */,
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stance detected */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were performed */,
  "post_engagement_score" REAL /* Score based on post engagement */,
  "post_sentiment_score" REAL /* Score based on post sentiment */,
  "post_stance_score" REAL /* Score based on post stance */,
  "post_influence_score" REAL /* Influence score of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_last_trained" TEXT /* Last time the model was trained */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment detected */,
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stance detected */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  "result_explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
